node.html:
• Worked with a dedicated product team translating their requirements into deliverables that were later built by the software team
  • Engaged in the interviewing and hiring process of new engineers
  • Mentored Junior engineers
  • Created a design plan for the renewal of the website
  • Helped solidify the coding standards that are followed by the team

• Proposed and implemented a billing system for the newspaper online classified platform, this way clients did not have to go anywhere to pick up their bills, also helped the company save money on paper.
  • Built a "Self checkout" system, where clients that came to the company's office did not have to wait in line to publish their classifed ad since they could do it by themselves in this platform.

• Built commercial websites for different clients, these commercial websites were customized through a CMS System that we also built, So the clients could update their websites whenever they wanted.
  • Developed and maintaned the billing system that was used by different clients.
  • Clients included banks, retailers, insurance companies
  • Promoted to software team lead
  • As a team lead I worked with my team to help better the quality of the software that we shipped to the clients (Established standards, goals and metrics).
